zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_A_1: $self$仿佛有所感应，在你手掌落下的瞬间便主动迎了上来，发出一声满足的叹息。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_A_2: $self$微微眯起双眼，停下手中的动作，乖巧地将头轻靠在$target$的手心里。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_A_3: $self$嘴角不自觉地上扬，全身放松下来，一副任由$target$摆布的模样。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_A_4: $self$轻声嘟囔着“头发会乱的啦”，身体却丝毫没有躲闪的意思。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_B_1: $self$浑身一僵，双眼瞬间睁大，愣愣地看着$target$，完全忘记了该怎么躲闪。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_B_2: $self$的动作停滞了半拍，眼神中充满困惑，却也没有第一时间推开你。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_B_3: $self$有些不知所措地眨了眨眼，身体僵硬，似乎正在努力判断$target$的意图。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_B_4: $self$微张着嘴，惊讶得说不出话来，任由那只手停留在自己的头顶。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_C_1: $self$触电般地瑟缩了一下，随即死死咬住下唇，不敢发出任何声响。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_C_2: $self$的身体止不住地轻颤，眼神惊恐地游移，双手紧紧攥住衣角。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_C_3: $self$低下头试图消除自己的存在感，活像一只等待审判的受惊小兽。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_Begin_C_4: $self$呼吸急促而紊乱，紧闭双眼，强迫自己忍耐头顶传来的触感。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_D_1: $self$在睡梦中感觉到头顶的触感，无意识地蹭了蹭枕头，嘴角溢出一丝晶莹的口水。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_D_2: $self$发出含混的梦呓，眉头舒展，似乎正沉浸在一个温暖的梦境中。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_D_3: $self$翻了个身，像寻找热源的小动物般本能地向$target$的手掌拱去。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_D_4: $self$并未醒来，只是呼吸变得愈发绵长平稳，这抚摸仿佛是最好的催眠曲。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_E_1: $self$保持着上一秒的动作僵立在原地，毫无知觉地承受着$target$指尖在发丝间的游走。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_E_2: $self$那双失去高光的瞳孔呆滞地望着前方，对头顶的任何触碰都无法给予丝毫回应。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_E_3: $self$宛如一尊精致的人偶，任凭$target$如何揉弄她的发丝，连一根睫毛都不曾颤动。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_E_4: $self$凝固在半空的表情依旧维持原状，完全无法感知自己的头发已被揉乱。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_F_1: $self$敏捷地缩了缩脖子，笑着拍掉$target$的手："别闹，刚做好的发型！"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_F_2: $self$有些嫌弃地向后仰头："你的手洗了吗？全是油！"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_F_3: $self$抓住$target$的手腕，眼神带笑却动作坚决："现在不行，我在忙正事呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_F_4: $self$鼓着脸颊用头顶了回去："我又不是小孩子，别老摸我的头！"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_G_1: $self$礼貌而尴尬地笑了笑，侧身避开$target$的手："那个……我不太习惯这样。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_G_2: $self$不动声色地后退半步，保持社交距离："抱歉，发型师叮嘱过不能乱碰的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_G_3: $self$抬手虚挡了一下，语气温和却带着疏离："请不要这样，这让我有点困扰。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_G_4: $self$有些为难地歪了歪头："我们好像还没熟到这种程度吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_H_1: $self$猛地拍开$target$的手，眼神瞬间冰冷："请你自重！"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_H_2: $self$像看脏东西一样后退两步，甚至拍了拍刚才差点被碰到的地方："别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_H_3: $self$厌恶地皱眉，语气冰冷刺骨："你是有什么毛病吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_H_4: $self$直接无视伸过来的手，转身就走，只留下一个充满敌意的背影。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_I_1: $self$完全瘫软在椅子上，喉咙里发出类似小猫呼噜的声音，显然已经享受得不想动弹。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_I_2: $self$紧抓着$target$衣角的手指紧了紧，迷迷糊糊地低语："嗯……不要停，再摸一会儿……"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_I_3: $self$脸颊泛起淡淡红晕，眼神湿润柔和："奇怪……被你这样摸着，感觉什么烦恼都没了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_I_4: $self$主动调整姿势，让$target$的手指能更顺畅地穿梭于发丝之间。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_J_1: $self$原本紧绷的肩膀慢慢松弛下来，眼底的戒备消退了不少："……其实，你的手法还挺专业的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_J_2: $self$有些尴尬地咳了一声，却并未移开身体："咳……倒也没那么讨厌就是了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_J_3: $self$偷偷抬眼瞄了一下$target$，脸颊浮现一抹不自然的红晕："以前从来没人这样摸过我……"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_J_4: $self$低着头不再言语，原本抗拒的姿态已化作一种默许的顺从。
zh-cn.com_touch_head_K_1: $self$僵硬地挺直脖子，终于忍不住抓住$target$的手腕："够了，我的脖子都要断了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_K_2: $self$皱眉整理被弄乱的刘海，语气里多了一丝烦躁："适可而止吧，这也太久了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_K_3: $self$不动声色地挪开身体，拉开与$target$的距离："好了，头皮都要被你搓掉一层皮了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_K_4: $self$叹了口气，眼神变得有些冷淡："你还要摸到什么时候？我也需要私人空间的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_L_1: $self$眼里的厌恶几乎满溢，身体紧绷如拉满的弓："你到底还要摸多久？变态吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_L_2: $self$深吸一口气，强压怒火推开$target$的手："这就是你的职场骚扰方式吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_L_3: $self$冷笑一声，眼神满是鄙夷："摸够了吗？摸够了就给我滚远点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_head_L_4: $self$没有任何言语，只是用看垃圾般的眼神死死盯着$target$，直到对方感到不适停手。

en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_A_1: $self$ seems to sense it coming and actively leans in the moment your hand falls, letting out a satisfied sigh.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_A_2: $self$ squints slightly, stopping what she was doing, and obediently leans her head into $target$'s palm.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_A_3: The corners of $self$'s mouth unconsciously turn up as her body relaxes, looking ready to let $target$ do whatever they please.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_A_4: $self$ mumbles softly, "My hair will get messy, you know," but her body shows no intention of dodging.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_B_1: $self$ stiffens all over, eyes widening instantly as she stares blankly at $target$, completely forgetting to dodge.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_B_2: $self$'s movements pause for a beat; her eyes are full of confusion, but she doesn't push you away immediately.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_B_3: $self$ blinks in bewilderment, her body rigid, seemingly trying to judge $target$'s intentions.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_B_4: $self$'s mouth parts slightly, too surprised to speak, allowing the hand to rest on top of her head.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_C_1: $self$ flinches as if electrified, then bites her lower lip hard, daring not to make a sound.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_C_2: $self$'s body can't stop trembling slightly, her terrified eyes darting around while her hands tightly grip the hem of her clothes.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_C_3: $self$ lowers her head, trying to minimize her presence, like a frightened small animal awaiting judgment.
en-us.com_touch_head_Begin_C_4: $self$'s breathing becomes rapid and erratic; she squeezes her eyes shut, forcing herself to endure the touch on her head.
en-us.com_touch_head_D_1: Feeling the touch on her head in her sleep, $self$ unconsciously nuzzles the pillow, a glistening trail of drool escaping the corner of her mouth.
en-us.com_touch_head_D_2: $self$ mutters incoherently in her sleep, her brow unfurrowing as if she is having a warm dream.
en-us.com_touch_head_D_3: $self$ rolls over, instinctively arching towards $target$'s palm like a small animal seeking warmth.
en-us.com_touch_head_D_4: $self$ doesn't wake up, but her breathing becomes deeper and steadier, as if the stroking is the best lullaby.
en-us.com_touch_head_E_1: $self$ remains frozen in her previous pose, enduring $target$'s fingertips wandering through her hair without any perception.
en-us.com_touch_head_E_2: $self$'s dull, highlight-less eyes stare blankly ahead, unable to give any response to the touch on her head.
en-us.com_touch_head_E_3: Like an exquisite doll, $self$ lets $target$ mess with her hair, not even a single eyelash trembling.
en-us.com_touch_head_E_4: $self$'s expression remains frozen in mid-air, completely unaware that her hair has been messed up.
en-us.com_touch_head_F_1: $self$ agilely shrinks her neck and laughingly slaps $target$'s hand away: "Stop it, I just got my hair done!"
en-us.com_touch_head_F_2: $self$ tilts her head back with a look of distaste: "Did you wash your hands? They're all oily!"
en-us.com_touch_head_F_3: $self$ grabs $target$'s wrist, her eyes smiling but her action firm: "Not now, I'm busy with something important."
en-us.com_touch_head_F_4: $self$ puffs out her cheeks and headbutts back: "I'm not a kid, stop touching my head!"
en-us.com_touch_head_G_1: $self$ gives a polite but awkward smile and turns sideways to avoid $target$'s hand: "Um... I'm not really used to this."
en-us.com_touch_head_G_2: $self$ quietly takes a half-step back, maintaining social distance: "Sorry, my stylist said not to touch it."
en-us.com_touch_head_G_3: $self$ raises a hand to block gently, her tone gentle but distant: "Please don't, this bothers me a little."
en-us.com_touch_head_G_4: $self$ tilts her head, looking somewhat troubled: "We aren't close enough for this, are we?"
en-us.com_touch_head_H_1: $self$ abruptly slaps $target$'s hand away, her eyes instantly turning cold: "Please have some self-respect!"
en-us.com_touch_head_H_2: $self$ steps back as if looking at something dirty, even patting the spot that was almost touched: "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_head_H_3: $self$ frowns in disgust, her tone piercingly cold: "Is there something wrong with you?"
en-us.com_touch_head_H_4: $self$ simply ignores the outstretched hand and walks away, leaving behind only a back view filled with hostility.
en-us.com_touch_head_I_1: $self$ goes completely limp in the chair, making a sound like a purring kitten in her throat, clearly enjoying it too much to move.
en-us.com_touch_head_I_2: $self$ tightens her grip on $target$'s hem, murmuring dizzily: "Mmm... don't stop, just a little longer..."
en-us.com_touch_head_I_3: $self$ blushes faintly, her eyes becoming moist and soft: "Strange... being touched by you like this, I feel like all my worries are gone."
en-us.com_touch_head_I_4: $self$ actively adjusts her posture to let $target$'s fingers move more smoothly through her hair.
en-us.com_touch_head_J_1: $self$'s previously tense shoulders slowly relax, and the wariness in her eyes fades significantly: "...Actually, your technique is quite professional."
en-us.com_touch_head_J_2: $self$ coughs awkwardly but doesn't move away: "Ahem... well, it's not that I hate it."
en-us.com_touch_head_J_3: $self$ steals a glance at $target$, an unnatural blush appearing on her cheeks: "No one has ever touched me like this before..."
en-us.com_touch_head_J_4: $self$ lowers her head and stops speaking, her originally resistant stance turning into a silent submission.
en-us.com_touch_head_K_1: $self$ stiffens her neck and finally grabs $target$'s wrist: "Enough, my neck is going to break."
en-us.com_touch_head_K_2: $self$ frowns and fixes her messy bangs, a hint of irritability in her tone: "That's enough, it's been too long."
en-us.com_touch_head_K_3: $self$ quietly moves her body away, putting distance between herself and $target$: "Okay, you're going to rub my scalp off."
en-us.com_touch_head_K_4: $self$ sighs, her eyes turning somewhat cold: "How long are you going to keep this up? I need some personal space."
en-us.com_touch_head_L_1: $self$'s eyes are overflowing with disgust, her body tense like a drawn bow: "How long are you going to touch me? Are you a pervert?"
en-us.com_touch_head_L_2: $self$ takes a deep breath, suppressing her anger as she pushes $target$'s hand away: "Is this your method of workplace harassment?"
en-us.com_touch_head_L_3: $self$ sneers, her eyes full of disdain: "Done touching? If you're done, get lost."
en-us.com_touch_head_L_4: $self$ says nothing, just staring dead at $target$ with eyes that look at trash, until the other party feels uncomfortable and stops.
